mapper.select: SELECT b.bom_id, b.product_id, p.product_name, b.bom_name, b.bom_date, b.status, b.bom_etc FROM bom_master b JOIN product p ON b.product_id = p.product_id
SELECT b.bom_id, b.product_id, p.product_name, b.bom_name, b.bom_date, b.status, b.bom_etc FROM bom_master b JOIN product p ON b.product_id = p.product_id WHERE b.bom_id = #{bomId}
SELECT bom_id FROM bom_master WHERE bom_id LIKE 'BM-%' ORDER BY CAST(SUBSTRING(bom_id, 4) AS UNSIGNED) DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bom_detail (bom_detail_id, bom_id, material_id, material_name, material_type, qty, unit, remark, reg_date) VALUES (#{bomDetailId}, #{bomId}, #{materialId}, #{materialName}, #{materialType}, #{qty}, #{unit}, #{remark}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT product_id, product_name FROM product where product_status = '생산'
SELECT material_id, material_name, unit FROM material
mapper.update: UPDATE bom_detail SET material_id = #{materialId}, material_name = #{materialName}, material_type = #{materialType}, qty = #{qty}, unit = #{unit}, remark = #{remark} WHERE bom_detail_id = #{bomDetailId}
